title: Property Consultant - CBRE India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - CBRE India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
